metadata.significance: Teaches about treating all people equally regardless of social status

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ عَبَسَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ

translations.en_sahih: The Prophet frowned and turned away
translations.en_yusufali: (The Prophet) frowned and turned away,
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia memasamkan muka dan berpaling,

translations.en_sahih: Because there came to him the blind man, [interrupting].
translations.en_yusufali: Because there came to him the blind man (interrupting).
translations.ms_basmeih: Kerana ia didatangi orang buta.

translations.en_sahih: But what would make you perceive, [O Muhammad], that perhaps he might be purified
translations.en_yusufali: But what could tell thee but that perchance he might grow (in spiritual understanding)?-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan apa jalannya engkau dapat mengetahui (tujuannya, wahai Muhammad) ? Barangkali ia mahu membersihkan hatinya (dengan pelajaran ugama yang didapatinya daripadamu)! -

translations.en_sahih: Or be reminded and the remembrance would benefit him?
translations.en_yusufali: Or that he might receive admonition, and the teaching might profit him?
translations.ms_basmeih: Ataupun ia mahu mendapat peringatan, supaya peringatan itu memberi manfaat kepadanya.

translations.en_sahih: As for he who thinks himself without need,
translations.en_yusufali: As to one who regards Himself as self-sufficient,
translations.ms_basmeih: Adapun orang yang merasa keadaannya telah cukup, tidak berhajat lagi (kepada ajaran Al-Quran),

translations.en_sahih: To him you give attention.
translations.en_yusufali: To him dost thou attend;
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka engkau bersungguh-sungguh melayaninya.

translations.en_sahih: And not upon you [is any blame] if he will not be purified.
translations.en_yusufali: Though it is no blame to thee if he grow not (in spiritual understanding).
translations.ms_basmeih: Padahal engkau tidak bersalah kalau ia tidak mahu membersihkan dirinya (dari keingkarannya).

translations.en_sahih: But as for he who came to you striving [for knowledge]
translations.en_yusufali: But as to him who came to thee striving earnestly,
translations.ms_basmeih: Adapun orang yang segera datang kepadamu,

translations.en_sahih: While he fears [Allah],
translations.en_yusufali: And with fear (in his heart),
translations.ms_basmeih: Dengan perasaan takutnya (melanggar perintah-perintah Allah), -

translations.en_sahih: From him you are distracted.
translations.en_yusufali: Of him wast thou unmindful.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka engkau berlengah-lengah melayaninya.

translations.en_sahih: No! Indeed, these verses are a reminder;
translations.en_yusufali: By no means (should it be so)! For it is indeed a Message of instruction:
translations.ms_basmeih: Janganlah melakukan lagi yang sedemikian itu! Sebenarnya ayat-ayat Al-Quran adalah pengajaran dan peringatan (yang mencukupi).

translations.en_sahih: So whoever wills may remember it.
translations.en_yusufali: Therefore let whoso will, keep it in remembrance.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka sesiapa yang mahukan kebaikan dirinya, dapatlah ia mengambil peringatan daripadanya.

translations.en_sahih: [It is recorded] in honored sheets,
translations.en_yusufali: (It is) in Books held (greatly) in honour,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Ayat-ayat Suci itu tersimpan) dalam naskhah-naskhah yang dimuliakan, -

translations.en_sahih: Exalted and purified,
translations.en_yusufali: Exalted (in dignity), kept pure and holy,
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang tinggi darjatnya, lagi suci (dari segala gangguan), -

translations.en_sahih: [Carried] by the hands of messenger-angels,
translations.en_yusufali: (Written) by the hands of scribes-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Terpelihara) di tangan malaikat-malaikat yang menyalinnya dari Lauh Mahfuz;

translations.en_sahih: Noble and dutiful.
translations.en_yusufali: Honourable and Pious and Just.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Malaikat-malaikat) yang mulia, lagi yang berbakti.

translations.en_sahih: Cursed is man; how disbelieving is he.
translations.en_yusufali: Woe to man! What hath made him reject Allah;
translations.ms_basmeih: Binasalah hendaknya manusia (yang ingkar) itu, betapa besar kekufurannya?

translations.en_sahih: From what substance did He create him?
translations.en_yusufali: From what stuff hath He created him?
translations.ms_basmeih: (Tidakkah ia memikirkan) dari apakah ia diciptakan oleh Allah? -

translations.en_sahih: From a sperm-drop He created him and destined for him;
translations.en_yusufali: From a sperm-drop: He hath created him, and then mouldeth him in due proportions;
translations.ms_basmeih: Dari air mani diciptakanNya, serta dilengkapkan keadaannya dengan persediaan untuk bertanggungjawab;

translations.en_sahih: Then He eased the way for him;
translations.en_yusufali: Then doth He make His path smooth for him;
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian jalan (baik dan jahat), dimudahkan Tuhan kepadanya (untuk menimbang dan mengambil mana satu yang ia pilih);

translations.en_sahih: Then He causes his death and provides a grave for him.
translations.en_yusufali: Then He causeth him to die, and putteth him in his grave;
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian dimatikannya, lalu diperintahkan supaya ia dikuburkan;

translations.en_sahih: Then when He wills, He will resurrect him.
translations.en_yusufali: Then, when it is His Will, He will raise him up (again).
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian apabila Allah kehendaki dibangkitkannya (hidup semula).

translations.en_sahih: No! Man has not yet accomplished what He commanded him.
translations.en_yusufali: By no means hath he fulfilled what Allah hath commanded him.
translations.ms_basmeih: Janganlah hendaknya ia kufur ingkar lagi! Sebenarnya ia belum menunaikan apa yang diperintahkan kepadanya.

translations.en_sahih: Then let mankind look at his food -
translations.en_yusufali: Then let man look at his food, (and how We provide it):
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kalaulah ia tidak memikirkan asal dan kesudahan dirinya), maka hendaklah manusia melihat kepada makanannya (bagaimana kami mentadbirkannya):

translations.en_sahih: How We poured down water in torrents,
translations.en_yusufali: For that We pour forth water in abundance,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya kami telah mencurahkan hujan dengan curahan yang menakjubkan.

translations.en_sahih: Then We broke open the earth, splitting [it with sprouts],
translations.en_yusufali: And We split the earth in fragments,
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian kami belah-belahkan bumi dengan belahan yang sesuai dengan tumbuh-tumbuhan, -

translations.en_sahih: And caused to grow within it grain
translations.en_yusufali: And produce therein corn,
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu Kami tumbuhkan pada bumi biji-bijian,

translations.en_sahih: And grapes and herbage
translations.en_yusufali: And Grapes and nutritious plants,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan buah anggur serta sayur-sayuran,

translations.en_sahih: And olive and palm trees
translations.en_yusufali: And Olives and Dates,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Zaitun serta pohon-pohon kurma,

translations.en_sahih: And gardens of dense shrubbery
translations.en_yusufali: And enclosed Gardens, dense with lofty trees,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan taman-taman yang menghijau subur,

translations.en_sahih: And fruit and grass -
translations.en_yusufali: And fruits and fodder,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan berbagai buah-buahan serta bermacam-macam rumput, -

translations.en_sahih: [As] enjoyment for you and your grazing livestock.
translations.en_yusufali: For use and convenience to you and your cattle.
translations.ms_basmeih: Untuk kegunaan kamu dan binatang-binatang ternak kamu.

translations.en_sahih: But when there comes the Deafening Blast
translations.en_yusufali: At length, when there comes the Deafening Noise,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian (ingatlah keadaan yang berlaku) apabila datang suara jeritan yang dahsyat, -

translations.en_sahih: On the Day a man will flee from his brother
translations.en_yusufali: That Day shall a man flee from his own brother,
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada hari seseorang itu lari dari saudaranya,

translations.en_sahih: And his mother and his father
translations.en_yusufali: And from his mother and his father,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan ibunya serta bapanya,

translations.en_sahih: And his wife and his children,
translations.en_yusufali: And from his wife and his children.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan isterinya serta anak-anaknya; -

ayahs.arabic: لِكُلِّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ شَأْنٌ يُغْنِيهِ
ayahs.transliteration: Likulli imriin minhum yawmaithin shanun yughneehi

translations.en_sahih: For every man, that Day, will be a matter adequate for him.
translations.en_yusufali: Each one of them, that Day, will have enough concern (of his own) to make him indifferent to the others.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kerana tiap-tiap seorang dari mereka pada hari itu, ada perkara-perkara yang cukup untuk menjadikannya sibuk dengan hal dirinya sahaja.

translations.en_sahih: [Some] faces, that Day, will be bright -
translations.en_yusufali: Some faces that Day will be beaming,
translations.ms_basmeih: Muka (orang-orang yang beriman) pada hari itu berseri-seri,

translations.en_sahih: Laughing, rejoicing at good news.
translations.en_yusufali: Laughing, rejoicing.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tertawa, lagi bersuka ria;

translations.en_sahih: And [other] faces, that Day, will have upon them dust.
translations.en_yusufali: And other faces that Day will be dust-stained,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan muka (orang-orang yang ingkar) pada hari itu penuh berdebu,

translations.en_sahih: Blackness will cover them.
translations.en_yusufali: Blackness will cover them:
translations.ms_basmeih: Diliputi oleh warna hitam legam dan gelap-gelita. -

translations.en_sahih: Those are the disbelievers, the wicked ones.
translations.en_yusufali: Such will be the Rejecters of Allah, the doers of iniquity.
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka itu ialah orang-orang yang kafir, yang derhaka.
